title: cichorium intybus
intro: Cichorium intybus, also known as the common dandelion or succory, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Cichorium intybus lie in its roots and leaves, which have been used to treat various health conditions due to their rich content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and inulin. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as improving liver function, reducing inflammation, and supporting digestive health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Cichorium intybus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
